india_trends.summary: Citius TransNet Investment Trust InvIT IPO is priced between ₹99 and ₹100, with subscription from April 17 to April 21. It allocates 75% to QIBs and 25% to NIIs, aiming to raise ₹1,105 crore for acquisitions and corporate purposes.

india_trends.summary: Since the tax hike announcement made at the beginning of the year, cigarette stocks have declined between 10-17%. Industry leader ITC has emerged as the top loser as the Nifty 50 stock is down 17.55% at the ₹300 levels currently.

india_trends.title: FPIs outflows hit ₹1.8 lakh crore YTD. Where are foreign investors headed as they dump Indian stocks?
india_trends.summary: FPIs have pulled out ₹1.8 lakh crore from Indian equities in 2026, influenced by geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices. Investments are now focusing on markets like Taiwan and Japan, although mutual fund inflows show positive market signs, depending on future geopolitical developments.

india_trends.title: Cathie Wood vs Michael Burry: The $11 million Palantir bet that’s splitting Wall Street
india_trends.summary: Cathie Wood bought $11 million worth of Palantir Technologies shares, boosting ARK ETFs’ holdings to over ₹283 crore, even as Michael Burry remains bearish. The funds also sold over $10 million worth of Advanced Micro Devices shares.
